name: Writing Hookify Rules
tagline: Explains hookify rule file syntax (frontmatter fields, conditions, regex patterns) for the .claude/hookify.*.local.md hook system.
verdict: Thorough, example-rich reference with deterministic defaults, testing guidance, and a version field. Weak points: frontmatter name isn't kebab-case, no explicit out-of-scope guidance, and a duplicated 'Quick Reference' section repeats earlier material instead of being split into a references file.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope text anywhere, despite plausible misfire onto other hook/config systems.
Trailing 'Quick Reference' section duplicates Event types/Field options/Operators already given earlier instead of being split into a reference file.
name: Writing Hookify Rules — contains spaces and capitals, not kebab-case.
